artifact.true_job: A real standalone HTML landing page for Loop Anything whose before/after comparison demonstrates aesthetic optimization: same core content and product claims, upgraded art direction, typography, composition, color, material treatment, inline SVG craft, and responsive polish.

runtime.subagent_mechanism: Task tool with isolated generalPurpose subagents

model_label: Cursor agent visible runtime; exact provider model not exposed

facets.name: Art direction and visual identity
facets.mission: Verify the final page is visually distinctive, cohesive, product-worthy, and README-worthy as an aesthetic before/after demonstration rather than a content rewrite.
facets.distinctness_rationale: A page can be valid, accessible, and well-structured while still looking generic or lacking art direction.

facets.name: Composition, typography, and spacing
facets.mission: Verify visual hierarchy, rhythm, scale, alignment, whitespace, grouping, and responsive composition.
facets.distinctness_rationale: A page can have a recognizable visual identity while still failing due to weak hierarchy, flat rhythm, cramped grouping, or poor mobile composition.

facets.name: Single-file frontend craft
facets.mission: Verify standalone browser-openable implementation quality, inline-only assets, responsive behavior, accessibility basics, semantic structure, and engineering restraint.
facets.distinctness_rationale: A page can look aesthetically polished while breaking the single-file/no-dependency constraint, accessibility basics, or responsive implementation quality.

evidence_items.description: Control standalone HTML baseline, usable but visually conservative.
Loop v0 HTML is byte-for-byte identical to the control baseline before Loop revision.
Final standalone HTML after aesthetic Loop revision.
Static HTML, dependency, checksum, and content-change evidence.
Final reviewer outputs all include Verdict PASS, Score 120, Must-fix issues none, and 120-level approval statements.

rounds.notes: Art direction returned REVISE 45, composition returned REVISE 72, and a PASS 115 frontend output was treated as invalid/non-passing because PASS requires Score 120.

Art direction and composition both returned REVISE 108; frontend craft returned PASS 120. A targeted aesthetics-only revision strengthened before/after visual contrast, hero proportions, section rhythm, tablet timeline, card hierarchy, and button states.
New isolated final reviewers returned PASS with Score 120 for all three facets.

token_estimate.note: Estimated from visible text only; not billing token usage. Hidden system prompts, tool schemas, provider routing, and billable accounting are not included.
